name: Push Up
instructions: Place your hands under your shoulders.
Keep your body straight from shoulders to ankles.
Lower with control, then push back to the starting position.

name: Bodyweight Squat
instructions: Stand with your feet roughly shoulder-width apart.
Lower your hips while keeping your chest lifted.
Drive through your feet to stand tall again.

name: Plank
instructions: Place your elbows under your shoulders.
Brace your core and keep your hips level.
Hold the position without letting your lower back collapse.

name: Walking Lunge
instructions: Step forward and lower until both knees bend.
Keep your front knee tracking over your foot.
Push through the front foot and step into the next rep.

name: Mountain Climber
instructions: Start in a high plank position.
Drive one knee toward your chest, then switch legs.
Keep your shoulders stable and move at a steady pace.

name: Triceps Dip
instructions: Place your hands on a stable bench behind your hips.
Lower your body with control by bending your elbows.
Press through your hands to return to the starting position.

name: Bicycle Crunch
instructions: Lie on your back with your knees raised.
Rotate your torso while bringing opposite elbow and knee closer.
Move steadily without pulling on your neck.

name: Jumping Jack
instructions: Stand tall with arms by your sides.
Jump your feet out while raising your arms overhead.
Return to the starting position and repeat at a steady rhythm.

name: Burpee
instructions: Squat down and place your hands on the floor.
Jump back into a plank, then return your feet under your hips.
Stand or jump upward to complete the rep.

name: Glute Bridge
instructions: Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet planted.
Drive through your heels and lift your hips.
Squeeze your glutes at the top, then lower with control.

name: Pike Push Up
instructions: Start with your hips high and hands planted firmly.
Lower the top of your head toward the floor.
Press back up while keeping control through your shoulders.

name: Brisk Walk
instructions: Walk at a pace that raises your breathing while still allowing short conversation.
Keep your shoulders relaxed and arms moving naturally.
Maintain steady effort for the full duration.

name: Treadmill Walk
instructions: Start at a comfortable speed.
Keep your posture tall and avoid leaning on the rails.
Increase incline or pace slightly if the effort feels too easy.

name: Stationary Bike
instructions: Set the seat height so your knee stays slightly bent at the bottom of the pedal stroke.
Pedal at a steady cadence with light to moderate resistance.
Keep your upper body relaxed.

name: Outdoor Bike Ride
instructions: Ride on a safe route at a steady effort.
Keep your cadence smooth and your grip relaxed.
Use easier gears before climbs to avoid sudden strain.

name: Jogging
instructions: Run at a controlled pace you can maintain.
Keep your steps light and your torso tall.
Slow to a walk if breathing becomes too hard to control.

name: High Knees
instructions: Run in place while lifting your knees toward hip height.
Keep your chest tall and arms moving.
Land softly and maintain a quick rhythm.

name: Jump Rope
instructions: Keep your elbows close to your body.
Turn the rope mostly with your wrists.
Jump just high enough for the rope to pass under your feet.

name: Stair Climb
instructions: Climb stairs at a steady pace.
Place your full foot on each step when possible.
Walk down carefully before starting the next interval.

name: Side Plank
instructions: Lie on one side with your elbow under your shoulder.
Lift your hips until your body forms a straight line.
Hold while keeping your ribs and hips stacked.

name: Dead Bug
instructions: Lie on your back with arms up and knees bent.
Lower opposite arm and leg while keeping your lower back steady.
Return to the start and alternate sides.

name: Bird Dog
instructions: Start on hands and knees.
Extend opposite arm and leg while keeping your hips level.
Pause briefly, then return with control.

name: Russian Twist
instructions: Sit with your knees bent and torso slightly leaned back.
Rotate your torso from side to side.
Keep the movement controlled instead of swinging.

name: Wall Sit
instructions: Lean your back against a wall.
Slide down until your knees are bent and thighs are close to parallel.
Hold the position while keeping your knees over your feet.

name: Calf Raise
instructions: Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Rise onto the balls of your feet.
Lower slowly until your heels touch the floor.

name: Side Lunge
instructions: Step to one side and bend that knee.
Keep the other leg straight and your chest lifted.
Push through the bent leg to return to standing.

name: Dumbbell Row
instructions: Hinge at the hips with one hand supported if needed.
Pull the dumbbell toward your ribs.
Lower with control without twisting your torso.

name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Hold dumbbells at shoulder height.
Press them overhead without arching your lower back.
Lower back to shoulder height with control.

name: Biceps Curl
instructions: Stand tall with dumbbells by your sides.
Curl the weights toward your shoulders.
Lower slowly while keeping your elbows close to your body.

name: Dumbbell Deadlift
instructions: Hold dumbbells in front of your thighs.
Hinge at the hips while keeping your back neutral.
Drive through your feet to stand tall again.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Hinge at your hips with the kettlebell between your legs.
Drive your hips forward to swing the bell to chest height.
Let the bell return between your legs while keeping your back neutral.

name: Band Pull Apart
instructions: Hold a resistance band at chest height.
Pull the band apart until your hands move toward your sides.
Return slowly while keeping your shoulders down.

name: Assisted Pull Up
instructions: Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Pull your chest toward the bar while bracing your core.
Lower under control to a full hang.

name: Leg Press
instructions: Place your feet on the platform about hip-width apart.
Lower the weight until your knees bend comfortably.
Press through your feet without locking your knees hard.

name: Lat Pulldown
instructions: Grip the bar wider than shoulder-width.
Pull the bar toward your upper chest.
Control the bar back up without shrugging your shoulders.
